title: A miniature fluorescence microscope for multi-plane imaging.
author: Barbera G Jun R Zhang Y Liang B Li Y Lin DT
content: S-EPMC9537509 PMC9537509 A miniature fluorescence microscope for multi-plane imaging. Miniature fluorescence microscopes are becoming an increasingly established tool to investigate neural circuits in freely moving animals.
